artifacts.summary: Research report analyzing current <leader>ac, <leader>ao, and <leader>ae keymaps with implementation recommendations

active_projects.completion_summary: Unified <leader>ao keymaps to match <leader>ac behavior. Created OpenCode visual selection module. Normal mode opens OpencodeCommands picker, visual mode prompts user and sends selection to OpenCode. Removed <leader>aoc, <leader>aoe, <leader>aot subcommands.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive research report identifying 15 ProofChecker virtues prioritized into 3 tiers (Critical, High, Medium value). Key findings: ADRs, TESTING.md, validation scripts, and domain context as extensions would most benefit nvim system.

Extended research comparing Logos/Theory/.opencode/ (best system) with nvim/.claude/. Identified 10 features to port for feature parity: documentation suite, parity tracking, checkpoint organization, MCP safety docs, and more. 34-hour implementation roadmap provided.
Feature parity analysis identifying 11 gap categories between .opencode/ and .claude/, with 9 prioritized recommendations
6-phase implementation plan for opencode feature parity including extension system, shared picker architecture, and context index
Implementation summary for opencode feature parity: shared picker, extension system, context index

active_projects.completion_summary: Implemented opencode feature parity with shared picker architecture supporting both .claude/ and .opencode/ directories, extension system with lean and formal domain extensions, and machine-readable context discovery via index.json.
active_projects.claudemd_suggestions: Added <leader>aoc keymap in which-key.lua, OpencodeCommands user command in opencode.lua, shared picker config at lua/neotex/plugins/ai/shared/picker/config.lua

artifacts.summary: Research report analyzing <leader>ac Load All sync behavior, project-overview.md exclusion gap, and CLAUDE.md file relationship

3-phase implementation plan: Phase 1 adds exclude_patterns parameter to scan_directory_for_sync in scan.lua, Phase 2 applies context exclusions and removes root CLAUDE.md sync in sync.lua, Phase 3 adds test cases to scan_spec.lua
Implementation summary with verification results

active_projects.completion_summary: Added exclude_patterns parameter to scan_directory_for_sync() and configured CONTEXT_EXCLUDE_PATTERNS to skip project-overview.md and self-healing-implementation-details.md. Removed root CLAUDE.md sync (only .claude/CLAUDE.md syncs now). Added 5 tests.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive comparison of nvim and ProofChecker .opencode systems across 10 dimensions (architecture, agents, domain knowledge, documentation, hooks, extensions, validation, state management) with recommendation to use nvim as base architecture and port ProofChecker domain context as extensions

Comprehensive comparison of Theory/.opencode/ against nvim/.opencode/ and nvim/.claude/, with detailed loss/gain analysis and 9-phase migration strategy for replacing nvim/.opencode/ with Theory/.opencode/ base while preserving neovim-specific elements and achieving .claude/ feature parity
6-phase migration plan to replace nvim/.opencode/ with Theory/.opencode/ base, porting neovim-specific agents, skills, and domain context
Implementation summary with verification results: 321 files, 17 agents, 22 skills

active_projects.completion_summary: Migrated nvim/.opencode/ to Theory/.opencode/ base, porting neovim-specific agents (3), skills (2), and domain context (17 files). Updated OPENCODE.md and settings.json for nvim project. Final system: 321 files, 17 agents, 22 skills.
active_projects.claudemd_suggestions: Created nvim/.opencode/ with Theory base plus neovim-specific agents/skills/context. Modified OPENCODE.md, settings.json, orchestration-core.md, index.md, project-overview.md, and added neovim-lua.md rules.

active_projects.completion_summary: Removed 25 extension-specific files from core .claude/ directory, created document-converter extension, and updated 14 reference files to point to extension system for latex/typst/document-converter capabilities.
active_projects.claudemd_suggestions: Removed latex/typst from CLAUDE.md routing tables and skill mappings. Added notes pointing to .claude/extensions/ for additional language support. Updated 14 files total including CLAUDE.md, README.md, routing.md, system-overview.md, and various docs/guides.
